evals.prompt: I have this Shortcut URL https://www.icloud.com/shortcuts/abc123def456 and want it in Cherri so I can commit it. Give me the migration steps and the first cleanup pass I should do after decompilation.
evals.expected_output: Shows cherri --import usage, explains generated code expectations, and lists include/const/function/control-flow/rawAction cleanup steps.
Uses const for immutable number, uses control-flow output for result, and updates interpolation syntax accordingly.

evals.prompt: A decompiled shortcut has the same Bear create note rawAction repeated four times. What should I do in Cherri? Include an example pattern but warn me about anything that must be verified.
evals.expected_output: Recommends creating a reusable action definition for the third-party action and warns that parameter keys/signature must be verified from shortcut data.
